title: Space Cube
description: Space Cube is a mod that creates space in another dimension
body:
# Space Cube
 ![spacecube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H5uBVVRE/images/575caba5fd6564897edf4e3ec947923f5ac00596.png)

This is better: [Compact Machines - Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/cpm-fabric) (1.18.2～1.19.2)

## Description

The mod is a port of Compact Machines for Fabric

The textures and code are created from scratch, so there may be specifications that are a little different from the original.

Unlike the original, currently you cannot see the contents of the room by right-clicking on the Space Cube.
I also plan to add an upgrader.

 

Required mods: Fabric API, MCPitanLib, Architectury API, Reborn Core (Optional), Cloth Config API, Mod Menu (Optional)
Mod Loader: Fabric Loader
License: MIT License
Modpack: Useable
